owner_intro: Former hedge fund trader, 10yr in equities/options/futures. Trading a leveraged bull thesis on Nasdaq via TQQQ LEAP spreads. Goal: $10k -> $1M by end of 2030.
strategy_summary: Rolling 24-month bull call spreads on TQQQ with long leg at 70% of spot with spread width being 89% of the spot price. One position per month. Positions held 13 months (rolled at 11 months remaining) for long-term capital gains treatment. No stops, no profit-taking below 2x debit. Diamond hands through drawdowns.
